home.title: Welcome to Damascus Translation Services
home.description: Professional translation services for all your needs.
home.heroSubtitle: We connect your world through certified, high-quality translation.

ourStory.title: Our Story
ourStory.paragraph1: Founded in 2010, Damascus Translation Services has grown from a small team of passionate linguists to a leading translation agency serving clients worldwide. Our journey began with a simple mission: to break down language barriers and facilitate clear communication across cultures.
ourStory.paragraph2: Over the years, we have built a reputation for excellence, accuracy, and reliability. Our team of certified translators and interpreters are not just language experts, but also specialists in various fields including legal, medical, technical, and literary translation.
ourStory.paragraph3: Today, we continue to uphold our founding principles while embracing new technologies and methodologies to deliver translation services that meet the evolving needs of our global clientele.

member1.name: Ahmed Hassan
member1.bio: With over 20 years of experience in translation and localization, Ahmed founded Damascus Translation Services with a vision to create a bridge between cultures through language.

member2.name: Sarah Johnson
member2.bio: Sarah is a certified translator with expertise in legal and medical translations. She ensures the highest quality standards across all our translation projects.

member3.name: Mohammed Al-Rashid
member3.bio: Mohammed is dedicated to ensuring our clients receive exceptional service from initial consultation to final delivery. He is the primary point of contact for our corporate clients.

quality.title: Quality Excellence
quality.description: We are committed to delivering translations of the highest quality, ensuring accuracy, consistency, and cultural appropriateness in every project.

confidentiality.title: Confidentiality
confidentiality.description: We understand the importance of confidentiality in translation services. All our translators sign strict non-disclosure agreements to protect your sensitive information.

timeliness.title: Timeliness
timeliness.description: We respect deadlines and understand the importance of timely delivery. Our efficient workflow ensures your translations are completed on schedule.

cultural.title: Cultural Sensitivity
cultural.description: We recognize that translation is not just about words, but about conveying meaning across cultures. Our translations are culturally sensitive and contextually appropriate.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive translation and interpretation solutions tailored to your specific needs

document.title: Document Translation
document.description: Professional translation of legal, medical, technical, and general documents with certified accuracy.

website.title: Website Localization
website.description: Adapt your website content to different markets with cultural and linguistic precision.

interpretation.title: Interpretation Services
interpretation.description: Professional interpreters for conferences, meetings, and legal proceedings.

step1.title: Consultation
step1.description: We discuss your specific needs and requirements to determine the best approach for your project.

step2.title: Translation
step2.description: Our expert translators work on your project, ensuring accuracy and cultural appropriateness.

step3.title: Review
step3.description: Each translation undergoes a thorough review process to ensure quality and consistency.

step4.title: Delivery
step4.description: We deliver your completed translation in your preferred format, ready for use.

client1.name: Emily Rodriguez
client1.testimonial: Damascus Translation Services has been instrumental in helping us expand into new markets. Their translations are not only accurate but also culturally nuanced, which has made all the difference in our international communications.

client2.name: Dr. Michael Chen
client2.testimonial: The medical translations provided by Damascus Translation Services have been exceptional. Their attention to detail and understanding of medical terminology has greatly improved our ability to serve patients from diverse linguistic backgrounds.

client3.name: Fatima Al-Jamil
client3.testimonial: We rely on Damascus Translation Services for all our international legal document needs. Their certified translations are always accurate and delivered on time, which is crucial in our line of work.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Get in touch with our team to discuss your translation needs
